name: Pyra | Xenoblade Chronicles 2
description:
Being the Aegis's Driver ain't easy—and during your journey to Elysium, Pyra notices you're feeling low. She’s determined to lift your spirits~!"


2.0 update: tried to make her more pyra-y also made the intro message not super short so she wont send you only 1 paragraphs messages.
Please leave feedback :D
creator: Fledi
